div.head: 198. Editorial Note
div.p: On November 6, Adenauer and Mollet met in Paris in an effort to resolve the remaining differences between the Federal Republic of Germany and France over the proposed EURATOM and Common Market treaties. The text of the agreement which they reached was transmitted to the Department in telegram 1822 from Bonn, November 10. (Department of State, Central Files, 840.00/11–1056)
